author: Martin Jäger
message:
mac: region: RegionCommon: fix implicit double promotion (#1600)

The calculation is done with float variables. However, the floor
function is meant for double variables. floorf should be used instead.

The implicit double promotion leads to a warning/error if compiled with
LLVM.

Signed-off-by: Martin Jäger <martin@libre.solar>

author: Miguel Luis
message: Added a note concerning the LBM stack availability and LoRaMac-node moving to maintenance mode.

author: Miguel Luis
message: Fixed PR #1569 for loop j variable wasn't being incremented.

author: Miguel Luis
message: Fixed an issue where time to time the unicast and multicast ping-slot windows could stop being opened up until the next beacon reception

author: Miguel Luis
message: Fixed wrong variable being used to apply the multicast downlink data rate

author: Miguel Luis
message: Fixed potential continuous addition of DeviceTimeReq MAC command while Class B activation is pending

author: Miguel Luis
message: Added a critical section protection for Ctx.PingSlotState and Ctx.MulticastSlotState variables update

author: Miguel Luis
message: Fixed the multicast downlink processing to only allow the reception if FCntDown is in the range of multicast group FCountMin..FCountMax

author: Miguel Luis
message: Remove the possibility to receive multicast confirmed downlinks

author: Miguel Luis
message: Changed "Check if we expect a ping or a multicast slot" to not perform the check exclusively

author: Jordan Yates
message:
utilities: fix shadowed variables (#1569)

Fix shadowed variables in the radio driver and utility functions.

utilities.h:183:44: error: declaration of 'mask' shadows a previous
local [-Werror=shadow]
  183 | #define CRITICAL_SECTION_BEGIN( ) uint32_t mask; BoardCritica...

Signed-off-by: Fabio Baltieri <fabiobaltieri@google.com>
Signed-off-by: Jordan Yates <jordan.yates@data61.csiro.au>

Support LoRaWAN 1.1 with ATECC608A/B secure element (#1382)

* Support LoRaWAN 1.1 with ATECC608A/B secure element

author: Miguel Luis

author: Miguel Luis

message: Issue #913 - Added an option for MAC commands to verify against an explicit confirmation.

author: Miguel Luis
message: Issue #1356 - Removed unused ACTIVE_REGION pre-processing check

author: Miguel Luis
message:
Issue #1359 - Fixed inconsistent handling of undefined callbacks

- Ensured that every MacProcessNotify callback call has a guard (LoRaMac.c, LoRaMacClassB.c)
- Added a guard to  GetRandomSeed callback call (LmHandler.c)
- Added a guard to  OnNvmDataChange callback call (LmHandler.c)
- Added a guard to OnNetworkParametersChange  callback call (LmHandler.c)
- Added a guard to OnMacMcpsRequest, OnMacMlmeRequest, OnJoinRequest, OnTxData, OnRxData, OnClassChange, OnBeaconStatusChange,  and OnSysTimeUpdate callback calls (LmHandler.c, LmhpCompliance.c)

author: Miguel Luis
message: Issue #1272 - Applied the proposed fix for the CRC check of empty struct

author: Simon Wörner
message: Fixed potential buffer overflow in `ProcessRadioRxDone`

author: Miguel Luis
message: Issue #1352 - Fixed uninitialized variable warning when O2 and O3 gcc compiler optimizations are used
